framework_step: Design · Step 2 of 9: Establish the Unified Data Asset Inventory & Entity-Relationship Model

speech_to_text_block.underlying_engine: Digital India BHASHINI ASR Model Cluster
speech_to_text_block.##_rationale: Processes regional acoustic phone waves into raw vernacular scripts directly at the state telecom perimeter.

text_translation_block.underlying_engine: Digital India BHASHINI NMT Model Cluster
text_translation_block.##_rationale: Translates unstructured regional agricultural dialects into standardized administrative English strings.

text_to_speech_block.underlying_engine: Digital India BHASHINI TTS Model Cluster
text_to_speech_block.##_rationale: Converts outbound confirmation strings back into vernacular human speech for the IVR voice response gateway.

entity_extraction_block.underlying_engine: Local Fine-Tuned SLM via Ollama Framework Core
entity_extraction_block.hosting_provenance: Sovereign Local Hardware Instance (MacBook Pro Silicon Pool)
entity_extraction_block.##_governance_rationale: Running a localized SLM keeps citizen text processing completely within sovereign physical compute boundaries, preventing cloud PII leakage vectors.

identity_registry_rail.system_name: Sovereign Digital Identity Engine (Aadhaar / MOSIP Pattern Core)
identity_registry_rail.source_of_truth_for: Citizen Identity Verification & Tokenized String Extraction Validation
identity_registry_rail.##_security_note: Enforces the cryptographic boundary where cleartext identifiers convert into irreversible tokenized hashes.

agricultural_data_rail.source_of_truth_for: Cadastral land boundaries, geofenced plots, and seasonal crop sown records
agricultural_data_rail.##_architecture_note: AI outputs only inform eligibility decisions; this registry remains the sole authoritative source of truth for updating benefit balances.

social_protection_registry_dpg.source_of_truth_for: Subsidy claim case lifecycle management, status states, and human-in-the-loop fallback routing logs

payment_disbursement_rail.system_name: NPCI Aadhaar Payment Bridge System (APBS) / Mojaloop Ledger Rail
payment_disbursement_rail.source_of_truth_for: Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) execution clearing numbers
